title: gymnogramma obtusa
intro: Gymnogramma obtusa, also known as Rough Horsetail Fern, is a type of plant that belongs to the fern family and is native to tropical regions. Traditionally, Gymnogramma obtusa has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant is also known to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions. Gymnogramma obtusa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
